creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 188592
the add-on with Pale Moon on Windows 7 (top) and on FreeBSD-CURRENT (below)

Screenshot attached. Three issues: 

1. group borders are not apparent

2. page title texts overlap with each other

3. the two buttons, top right, have no icon and may be misaligned.

[grahamperrin@momh167-gjp4-hpelitebook8570p-freebsd] ~% pkg info palemoon | grep -i version
